# El Veci — El Copiloto del Pueblo

> Interactive map and AI-powered guide for Cabo Rojo, Puerto Rico. Find businesses, beaches, restaurants, and local adventures.

## About

El Veci is an interactive map and local guide for Cabo Rojo, Puerto Rico. It helps residents and visitors discover businesses, beaches, chinchorros, restaurants, and services. The app features an AI-powered WhatsApp assistant that answers questions about local businesses in real time.

## Key Facts

- Website: https://mapadecaborojo.com
- WhatsApp Bot: +1-787-417-7711 (text "menu" to start)
- Location: Cabo Rojo, Puerto Rico
- Businesses listed: 158+
- Language: Spanish
- Parent site: https://caborojo.com
- Creator: Angel Anderson (angel@caborojo.com)

## Features

- Interactive Leaflet map with all listed businesses
- Category filtering: Beaches, Food, Lodging, Services, Health, Shopping
- Individual place pages with hours, contact, location
- AI WhatsApp assistant (El Veci) for natural language business search
- PWA support (installable on mobile)
- Daily briefings and business recommendations

## Popular Places

- Playa Sucia (La Playuela)
- Faro Los Morrillos
- Poblado de Boquerón
- Joyuda (seafood strip)
- Combate Beach
- Salinas de Cabo Rojo

## Related Properties

- Directory: https://caborojo.com
- Events: https://loquehayhoy.com
- Community radar: https://radardepueblo.com
- Book funnel: https://mastiempo.net
- Author: https://angelanderson.com

## Contact

- Email: angel@caborojo.com
- WhatsApp: +1-787-417-7711
